scripts.conformance:core: node dna/conformance/cpu/run-cpu-exec-fixtures-self-test.mjs && node dna/conformance/cpu/run-fuse-suite.mjs --quiet && node dna/conformance/timing/run-timing-fixtures-self-test.mjs && node dna/conformance/timing/run-timing-fixtures.mjs --quiet && node dna/conformance/machine/run-machine-fixtures-self-test.mjs && node dna/conformance/machine/run-machine-fixtures.mjs --quiet && node dna/conformance/formats/run-format-fixtures-self-test.mjs && node dna/conformance/formats/run-format-fixtures.mjs --quiet
scripts.conformance:emulator: npm run conformance:core && npm run conformance:host-io
scripts.conformance:host-shell: node dna/conformance/audio/run-audio-fixtures-self-test.mjs && node dna/conformance/audio/run-audio-fixtures.mjs --quiet && node dna/conformance/keyboard/run-keyboard-fixtures-self-test.mjs && node dna/conformance/keyboard/run-keyboard-fixtures.mjs --quiet && node dna/conformance/raster/run-raster-fixtures-self-test.mjs && node dna/conformance/raster/run-raster-fixtures.mjs --quiet
